grant_title: Lowell requests $7M in HUD funding for 2026
project_area: affordable housing, homelessness services, food insecurity, domestic violence support, economic development, public facility projects
demographic_requirements: primarily low- and moderate-income residents, neighborhoods with high concentrations of low- and moderate-income residents
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include nonprofits and city government agencies in Lowell, Massachusetts. Funding supports programs addressing affordable housing, homelessness, food insecurity, domestic violence, economic development, and public facilities. Priority is given to projects benefiting low- and moderate-income residents and high-poverty neighborhoods.
